nodes.itemHTML: • Docusaurusstars23.4k - React-based static site generator by Facebook, ideal for content-centric websites.
• SciBERTstars921 - paper - A BERT model trained on >1M papers from the Semantic Scholar database.
• godot-gdscript-toolkitstars231 - Independent set of command line tools for working with GDScript - parser, linter and formatter (Godot 3.x).
• Build and publish docker images to any registry using Kanikostars30
• CodeceptJSstars3.4k - Supercharged End 2 End Testing Framework for Node.js.
• QA Wolfstars2.7k - Create browser tests 10x faster.
• Try Playwright - Interactive playground for running Playwright tests.
• query-selector-shadow-domstars125 - Extend the selectors engine by selecting Shadow DOM roots.
• playwright-videostars170 - Record your Chromium browser sessions.

• Blazor with guest Carl Franklin - March 9, 2020 - Carl Franklin is the guest to Weekly Dev Tips. Carl Franklin and Steve Smith (aka Ardalis) discuss Blazor in general and look at how to create a generic object picker control for Blazor.
• godotdetourstars61 - A GDNative implementation of the detour/detourcrowd library (Godot 3.2).
• Dependabot Automated dependency updates for Ruby, JavaScript, Python, PHP, Elixir, Rust, Java (Maven and Gradle), .NET, Go, Elm, Docker, Terraform, Git Submodules and GitHub Actions.
• All Transit - Interactive GTFS route and schedule animation (for U.S. cities) using Mapbox GL JS, Deck.gl and Transitland. Github repository herestars19.
• MeuScrum - Free online scrum tool with kanban board
• Load Testing with k6 - Brief overview of features and capabilities of k6.
• Test and visualize with InfluxDB, Grafana and K6 - Setting up load tests and visualizing them using grafana dashboards.
• Open source load testing tool review 2020 - Detailed comparison of the most popular open source load testing tools.
• k6-circleci-examplestars5 - Running k6 load tests as part of a CircleCI build.
• k6-jenkins-examplestars6 - Running k6 load tests as part of a Jenkins build.
• k6-github-actions-examplestars9 - Running k6 load tests as part of a GitHub Actions build.
• k6-azure-pipelines-examplestars8 - Running k6 load tests as part of an Azure DevOps Pipeline.
• k6-performance-test-websocketstars3 - Example of performance test for websocket with k6.
• k6-es6stars2 - Example project using Webpack, Babel and Browserify to make most ES6 code work in k6.
• k6-to-junitstars13 - Tool for converting k6 output to JUnit XML for easy use with CIs.
• har-to-k6stars31 - Tool for converting HAR recordings to k6 test scripts.
• postman-to-k6stars191 - Tool for converting Postman collections to k6 test scripts.
• jmeter-to-k6stars38 - Tool for converting JMeter test cases to k6 test scripts.
• jslib.k6.io - Useful utility libs for k6 scripts.
• CloudPosse's Load Testing Stackstars27 - Load testing stack using k6, Grafana and InfluxDB.
• Load Impact's OSS Load Testing Stackstars22 - Open-source stack that works well for running load tests, storing results and visualizing those results in dashboards.

• GitHub webhooks
    • snare — GitHub webhooks runner daemon
• Contexture Docs - Documentation of the entire Contexture ecosystem in one place.
• contexture-site - Showcase of Contexture searches adapting to diverse datasets such as: car crashes, restaurant locations, COVID-19, SAT scores, school grants, bank failures.
• contexture-imdbstars2 - An example usage of Contexture to present a search interface for an ElasticSearch index of movie records based on IMDB.
• GovSpend - A Contexture web-based tool that makes it easy for government agencies to find a product's best price, identify and validate vendors, request quotes and connect with peers.
• contexturestars15 - The core library that exectues the DSL to retrieve data.
• contexture-clientstars1 - The client library that manages the DSL, allowing for hyper efficient updates running only what is exactly needed.
• contexture-reactstars4 - React components for building Contexture interfaces.
• grey-veststars0 - Component library built for contexture-react.
• contexture-mongostars2 - MongoDB provider for Contexture.
• contexture-elasticsearchstars2 - Elasticsearch provider for Contexture.
• contexture-exportsstars0 - A library that extends Contexture by allowing developers to export searches into files or any other target.
• contexture-api - A simple FeathersJS REST API for Contexture.
• Contexture React Storybook - Contexture React components documentation and examples.
• GreyVest Storybook - GreyVest component library's documentation and examples.
• Contexturestars15 - Documentation on Contexture's core concepts, example usage, and implementation details.
• Contexture Clientstars1 - Documentation overview of the Contexture Client's features, api, and implementation details.
• Contexture ElasticSearchstars2 - Usage and API documentation for the Contexture ElasticSearch provider library.
• Contexture MongoDBstars2 - Usage and API documentation for the Contexture MongoDB provider library.
• Contexture Exportsstars0 - Core concepts and usage documentation for the Contexture Exports library.
• contexture-ec18-talkstars2 - Elasticon 2018 talk About Contexture.
• DataContexts talkstars0 - Older presentation on DataContexts, the precursor to contexture-client.

• Contexture Talk (raw) - This is a raw, unedited version of the talk about Contexture, a toolset for building highly interactive data exploration (aka search) interfaces at the 2018 South Florida Code Camp.
• Contexture Talk (screen) - This is a raw, unedited version of the talk about Contexture. This version only shows the screencast.
• ExtendsClass - Free web-based HTTP client to send HTTP requests.
• VarTypesstars12 - A feature-rich, object-oriented framework for managing variables in C++ / Qt4. [LGPL]
• cjsonstars4 - Wrap cJSON for vlang.
• Django Chat: Wagtail CMS - Tom Dyson - An interview with Tom Dyson on Wagtail, the leading Django-based CMS used by tens of thousands of organizations including Google, NASA, and the British NHS.
• Netlify Deploy GitHub Action for each commitstars158
• actions/delete-package-versionsstars112 - Delete versions of a package from GitHub Packages.
• SObjectizerstars181 - An implementation of Actor, Publish-Subscribe, and CSP models in one rather small C++ framework. [BSD-3-Clause]
• BRYTER - No-code platform for decision automation; Kotlin, Typescript, Vue.js, k8s
• Awesome CLIstars133 - A simple command-line tool to dive into Awesome lists.
• Beluganosstars98 - Beluganos is a new network OS designed for white-box switches (OF-DPA), which can apply large-scale networks.
• OcNOS - Extensive switching and routing protocol support with advanced capabilities such as MPLS and SDN
• Open Network Linux, ONL - A Linux distribution for "bare metal" switches, that is, network forwarding devices built from commodity components.
• OpenSwitch - A linux network operating system from Dell EMC.
• PicOS - A SDN OS for white box switches Layer-2/3 feature set with support for OpenFlow, OVSDB, and other protocols.
• SONiC - Software for Open Networking in the Cloud SONiC
• Stratum - An open source, silicon-independent switch operating system for software-defined networks
• BESSstars226 - Berkeley Extensible Software Switch, BESS is a modular framework for software switches.
• bmv2stars289- A P4 software switch which is usually used as a tool to verify the funtions the developers describe in P4 language.
• FD.IO - Relentlessly focused on data IO speed and efficiency for more flexible and scalable networks and storage
• Indigostars62 - Indigo is an open source project aimed at enabling support for OpenFlow on physical and hypervisor switches.
• Open vSwitch - Open vSwitch is a production quality, multilayer virtual switch.
• PISCES - A Programmable, Protocol-Independent Software Switch.
• gNMIstars276 - gRPC Network Management Interface
• gNOIstars84 - gRPC Network Operations Interface
• Beehive Network Controllerstars57 - A distributed SDN controller built on top of Beehive. It supports OpenFlow but can be easily extended for other southbound protocols.
• Floodlightstars675 - A java-based OpenFlow controller.
• IRIS - A Resursive SDN Openflow Controller created by SDN Research Section, ETRI.
• Netrackstars48 - An OpenFlow controller framework in Go.
• NOXstars127 - An open source development platform for C++-based software-defined networking (SDN) control applications.
• OESSstars24 - The Open Exchange Software Suite to configure and control OpenFlow Enabled switches.
• OpenDaylight - OpenDaylight Platform
• POXstars532 - An open source development platform for Python-based software-defined networking (SDN) control applications.
• Ravelstars8 - A software-defined networking (SDN) controller that uses a standard SQL database to represent the network.
• Trema - A full-stack, easy-to-use framework for developing OpenFlow controllers in Ruby and C.
• Vyattastars42 - The first commercial Controller built directly from OpenDaylight.
• Containernetstars228 - Mininet fork that allows to use Docker containers as hosts in emulated networks
• MaxiNet - MaxiNet extends the famous Mininet emulation environment to span the emulation across several physical machines. This allows to emulate very large software-defined networks.
• Mininet - An Instant Virtual Network on your Laptop (or other PC)
• OpenNetstars66 - A simulator for software-defined wireless local area network
• Freneticstars194 - The Frenetic Programming Language and Runtime System
• NEMO - A domain specific language (DSL) based on abstraction of network models and conclusion of operation patterns.
• oflib-nodestars15 - Oflib-node is an OpenFlow protocol library for Node. It converts between OpenFlow wire protocol messages and Javascript objects.
• openfaucetstars26 - openfaucet is a pure Python implementation of the OpenFlow 1.0.0 protocol, based on Twisted.
• OpenFlowJ - A Java implementation of low-level OpenFlow packet marshalling/unmarshalling and IO operations.
• Cbenech - Benchmarking tool for controllers
• ofteststars79 - OpenFlow Testing Framework
• STS - SDN Troubleshooting System, simulates network devices, allowing programmatically test cases generation.
• NVGRE - NVGRE-Network-Virtualization-using-Generic-Routing-Encapsulation
• VXLAN - Virtual Extensible LAN
• bgp4rstars26 - BGP4R is a ruby library which enables the creation and manipulation of BGP messages. In BGP4R, all well-known BGP constructs are defined in classes.
• BGPFeederstars4
• FreeRouter - Java-based vRouter

• Quagga - Quagga is a routing software suite, providing implementations of OSPFv2, OSPFv3, RIP v1 and v2, RIPng and BGP-4 for Unix platforms, particularly FreeBSD, Linux, Solaris and NetBSD. Quagga is a fork of GNU Zebra which was developed by Kunihiro Ishiguro.

• Open Network Automation Platform, ONAP - Alignment of the two projects creates a harmonized and comprehensive framework for real-time, policy-driven software automation of virtual network functions that will enable software, network, IT and cloud providers and developers to rapidly create new services.
• Open Source MANO Community, OSM
• OPEN-Orchestrator Project, Open-O

• ASAP2 - The ASAP2 accelerator is built on top of eSwitch NIC hardware, and allows either the entire virtual switch, or significant portions of virtual switch or distributed virtual router (DVR) operations to be offloaded to the Mellanox NIC

• mTCPstars1.6k - mTCP is a highly scalable user-level TCP stack for multicore systems. mTCP source code is distributed under the Modified BSD License. For more detail, please refer to the LICENSE. The license term of io_engine driver and ported applications may differ from the mTCP’s.

• net-next-nusestars250 - Network Stack in Userspace (NUSE) NUSE allows us to use Linux network stack as a library which any applications can directory use by linking the library. Each application has its own network stack so, it provides an instant virtualized environment apart from a host operating system.
• Apache Spot - Community-driven cybersecurity project, built from the ground up, to bring advanced analytics to all IT Telemetry data on an open, scalable platform
• DevOps for Networking
• Network Algorithmics：An Interdisciplinary Approach to Designing Fast Networked Devices
• Network Programmability and Automation Skills for the Next-Generation Network Engineer
• SDN网络指南(OpenSource Book in Chinese by Pengfei Ni)
• SDN核心技术剖析和实战指南
• Software Defined Networking with OpenFlow
• A Survey on the Security of Stateful SDN Data Planes
• SDN A Comprehensive Survey
• Dist 💲 - Private cloud-based Docker container registry
• caniuse.rsstars90 - Rust feature search.
• Michaela Greiler on Code Reviews - SE Radio 2020 Michaela Greiler discusses the importance of code reviews and how to conduct them on the Software Engineering Radio podcast.
• WhirlyGlobe-Maplystars717 - 3D globe and flat-map SDK for iOS. This toolkit has a large API for fine-grained control over the map or globe. It reads a wide variety of GIS data formats.
